Hearing Re: FINAL APPROVAL.

Matter discussed. Counsel Seligson requests a new date in December for the hearing regarding status of payments. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling with modifications:

The unopposed motion for final approval of class action and PAGA settlement is granted. The court will endorse the proposed order and judgment that class counsel lodged with the court. The court sets December 5, 2025 for hearing re: status of payments. No appearances will be required at the December 5 hearing, but class counsel shall submit a claims administrator declaration re status of payments at least five court days in advance of the hearing.

Order signed. Judgment signed.
